mapper.select: SELECT ECMT.BUYER_CD , ECMT.CONT_NUM , ECMT.CONT_CNT , ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD , ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD, ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECMT.VENDOR_CD , ECMT.ITEM_SQ , ECMT.PURCHASE_TYPE -- 구매유형 , ECMT.ITEM_CD -- 품목코드 , ECMT.ITEM_DESC -- 품명 , ECMT.ITEM_SPEC -- 규격 , ECMT.ITEM_QT -- 수량 , ECMT.UNIT_CD -- 단위 , ECMT.ITEM_PRC -- 단가 , ECMT.ITEM_AMT -- 금액 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN GETCOMCODE(ECMT.GATE_CD, 'M301', BDHD.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'RFQ' THEN '견적' ELSE '수의계약' END) AS CONT_TYPE1 ,GETCOMCODE(BDHD.GATE_CD, 'M302', BDHD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE2 -- 구매유형이 용역 인 경우 필수 , ECMT.SW_BIZ_AMT -- SW 사업대가 , ECMT.MNT_SANGJU_YN -- 상주여부 -- 구매유형이 물품/공사 인 경우 필수 , ECMT.CONSUMER_AMT -- 소비자금액 , ECMT.FC_MNT_TERM -- 무상유지보수기간 , ECMT.CH_RATE -- 유상요율 -- 구매유형이 유지보수 인 경우 필수 , ECMT.DOIB_AMOUNT -- 도입금액 , ECMT.MNT_RATE -- 유지보수요율 ,(ECMT.MNT_SDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_SDAY -- 유지보수시작일 ,(ECMT.MNT_EDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_EDAY -- 유지보수종료일 , ECMT.MNT_GUR_MONTH -- 개월수 , ECMT.RT_INSP_PERIOD -- 정기점검주기 , ECMT.FALT_RC_TG_TIME -- 장애복구묙표시간 ,(ECMT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE -- 납기요청일 , ECMT.IV_BUYER_CD -- 검수고객사 , ECMT.IV_DEPT_CD -- 검수부서/사무소 ,GETCUSTNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.IV_BUYER_CD) ' ' GETDEPTNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.IV_BUYER_CD, ECMT.IV_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS IV_BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECMT.IV_USER_ID -- 검수자ID ,GETUSERNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.IV_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS IV_USER_NM , ECMT."5_CONT_AMT" , ECMT."1_CONT_AMT" , ECMT.A_CONT_AMT , ECMT."2_CONT_AMT" , ECMT."3_CONT_AMT" , ECMT.CONT_WT_NUM , ECMT.RMK , ECMT.PR_NUM -- 구매의뢰번호 , ECMT.PR_SQ -- 구매의뢰순번 , ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD -- 구매(PR)회사코드 ,(PRDT.CM_REQ_ID, PRHD.APP_DOC_NUM) AS PR_APP_DOC_NUM -- ITA/ITB인 경우 IT포탈 의뢰번호 , PRHD.APP_DOC_CNT AS PR_APP_DOC_CNT , PRHD.MNT_YN -- [IT Portal] 유지보수계약여부 - Y:유지보수,O:도급,Z:기타 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN 'BID' ELSE 'RFQ' END) AS RFX_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN CNDT.BID_NUM ELSE CNDT.RFX_NUM END) AS RFX_NUM -- 견적/입찰번호 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN CNDT.BID_CNT ELSE CNDT.RFX_CNT END) AS RFX_CNT -- 견적/입찰차수 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN CNDT.VOTE_CNT END) AS VOTE_CNT -- 투찰차수 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDHD.APP_DOC_NUM ELSE RQHD.APP_DOC_NUM END) AS RFX_APP_DOC_NUM -- 공고결재번호 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDHD.APP_DOC_CNT ELSE RQHD.APP_DOC_CNT END) AS RFX_APP_DOC_CNT -- 공고결재차수 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN '1' ELSE NULL END) AS RFX_ESTM_RLT -- 입찰신청결과건수 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE '1' END) AS RFX_OPEN_RLT -- 개찰건수 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDHD.NEGO_APP_DOC_NUM ELSE NULL END) AS NEGO_APP_DOC_NUM -- 우선협상자선정 결재번호 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDHD.NEGO_APP_DOC_CNT ELSE NULL END) AS NEGO_APP_DOC_CNT -- 우선협상자선정 결재차수 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDHD.RLT_APP_DOC_NUM ELSE NULL END) AS FAIL_APP_DOC_NUM -- 유찰결과보고 결재번호 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDHD.RLT_APP_DOC_CNT ELSE NULL END) AS FAIL_APP_DOC_CNT -- 유찰결과보고 결재차수 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDHD.ESTM_TYPE ELSE (CASE WHEN RQHD.EST_PRICE_TYPE = '1' THEN 'SE' ELSE 'ES' END) END) AS ESTM_PRC_FLAG -- 예정가격 작성여부(작성, 생략 등) ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDES.APP_DOC_NUM ELSE RXES.APP_DOC_NUM END) AS ESTM_APP_DOC_NUM ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDES.APP_DOC_CNT ELSE RXES.APP_DOC_CNT END) AS ESTM_APP_DOC_CNT , ECMT.EXEC_NUM -- 선정품의번호 , ECMT.EXEC_SQ -- 선정품의순번 , CNHD.APP_DOC_NUM AS EXEC_APP_DOC_NUM , CNHD.APP_DOC_CNT AS EXEC_APP_DOC_CNT , ECCT.APP_DOC_NUM AS CONT_APP_DOC_NUM , ECCT.APP_DOC_CNT AS CONT_APP_DOC_CNT , PRDT.CONT_GROUND -- 계약근기 , PRHD.IF_TYPE , PRDT.PRE_BUYER_CD , PRDT.PRE_CONT_NUM , PRDT.PRE_CONT_CNT , PRDT.CM_REQ_ID , PRDT.MULPUM_ID FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.BUYER_CD AND CNDT.EXEC_NUM = ECMT.EXEC_NUM AND CNDT.EXEC_SQ = ECMT.EXEC_SQ AND CNDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCCNHD CNHD ON (CNHD.GATE_CD = CNDT.GATE_CD AND CNHD.BUYER_CD = CNDT.BUYER_CD AND CNHD.EXEC_NUM = CNDT.EXEC_NUM AND CNHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON (RQHD.GATE_CD = CNDT.GATE_CD AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = CNDT.BUYER_CD AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = CNDT.RFX_NUM AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = CNDT.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES RXES ON (RXES.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND RXES.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RXES.BID_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RXES.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD ON (BDHD.GATE_CD = CNDT.GATE_CD AND BDHD.BUYER_CD = CNDT.BUYER_CD AND BDHD.BID_NUM = CNDT.BID_NUM AND BDHD.BID_CNT = CNDT.BID_CNT AND BDHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES BDES ON (BDES.GATE_CD = BDHD.GATE_CD AND BDES.BUYER_CD = BDHD.BUYER_CD AND BDES.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND BDES.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT AND BDES.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (PRDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND PRDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD AND PRDT.PR_NUM = ECMT.PR_NUM AND PRDT.PR_SQ = ECMT.PR_SQ AND PRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRHD.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND PRHD.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND PRHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECCT ECCT ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = ECMT.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = ECMT.CONT_CNT AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY PRDT.CM_REQ_DET_ID ASC, PRDT.MULPUM_ID ASC, ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD ASC, ECMT.ITEM_SQ ASC
